verification.method: Open this manifest with a cache-busting query parameter and compare buildId plus sourceCommit with the deployed page readout.
verification.cachePolicy: The page fetches this file with cache: no-store and a cacheBust query parameter.
verification.sourceCommitPolicy: sourceCommit points to the final functional v0.27.7 commit containing long-run stability guards, resource-flow task-context cleanup, construction handoff protection, full action-runtime rollback continuity and the world-save app-version bump; later README, ROADMAP, CODEX and manifest commits may follow it.
